REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURROUGHS, MELISSA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURROUGHS, MELISSA AS TO DEFENDANT GENTRY, LINDA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-17-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MELISSA BURROUGHS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LINDA GENTRY IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURROUGHS, MELISSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GENTRY, LINDA $395.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $445.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
